title: Point93 - Assessment Platform
headings: Does Your Tech Match Their World?
text: Give Feedback Dashboard Assessments 6 View All Your Professional Foundation & Team Structure Your Firm Platform, Technology & Support Your Investment Management Excellence Your Planning Process & Implementation Your Client Service & Communication Your Fees, Value & Positioning Insight Areas Data Points Scores Reports Business Intelligence 5 View All NextGen Ready Client Referrals PitchPerfect COI Referrals Client Retention Risk ADMIN Area Builder BI Builder AI Hub Graph View User Management Analytics Feedback Beta AR Adam Rotmil adam.rotmil@toptal.com BUSINESS INTELLIGENCE NextGen Ready When your clients' children inherit, will they keep you? Research shows 80-90% of heirs fire their parents' advisor after inheritance. NextGen Ready analyzes whether you're positioned to retain wealth across generations—or whether you're building a practice that ends when your clients do. Begin Assessment 4 Stages 5 Questions 1 Do They Know You Exist? Have you met the heirs—or will inheritance be the first time they hear your name? Heirs who've never met you have no reason to keep you. This section measures whether you've built visibility with the next generation while you still have the chance. 2 Are You In The Conversation? Are you part of the family wealth discussion—or waiting to be introduced after it's decided? The most successful wealth transfers happen when advisors facilitate multi-generational conversations before inheritance. 3 Do You Speak Their Language? Do you understand what matters to the next generation—or assume they want what their parents wanted? NextGen investors prioritize differently—ESG considerations, social impact, life planning over pure portfolio management. 4 Does Your Tech Match Their World? Is your digital experience what they expect—or a reason to look elsewhere? Younger investors expect digital-first, transparent, accessible experiences. Technology shortcomings that older clients tolerate become dealbreakers for heirs. 0 Advisor Score At Risk Profile Completion 0 of 18 modules · Comprehensive Intelligence Profiles View all → 🎯 NextGen Ready 0% 🎯 Client Referrals 0% What Clients Are Asking Coming Soon Weekly - Jan 27 “Should I be worried about the new fiduciary rule changes?” Advisors rated ready 68% Your readiness 72 - top 34% Improve your ranking → Strengths / Weaknesses Complete modules to see your strengths and areas needing attention Insight Areas Complete modules to see your insight area scores
